title: Feature Request: Connect Board Column Item Order Same as Connected Board

posts.author: Elizabeth (Elizabeth Cordes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

When using the connect board column, the order of groups and items in the item list is random compared to the original board. I’ve confirmed with support that it’s meant to be that way right now and is not a bug.

You can see here, that the Workshop (optional) Item is the third in the group, despite being at the bottom on the original board that that houses the items.

It makes it very hard to find the correct group and item to connect when everything is in a random order, so my feature request is to display the groups and items in the Connect Board column in the same order as the original board.
